celestial_chain.title: Begin the Celestisynth chain — smelt Lunar Stone to Scrap, brew with Phantom Membranes, work toward Celestial Netherite

subtitle.text: Lunar. Zephyr. Solar. Three materials. One chain. The Celestial Netherite is what Netherite becomes when it reaches the stars.

description: CH.12 · CELESTISYNTH
▸ Celestisynth adds three dimensional materials
and a crafting chain that ends with Celestial Netherite.
It is the highest-tier material available before Ch15.
The three source materials come from different
elevation zones — underground, mountain, and Nether.
◈ SOURCE MATERIALS (THREE TYPES)
└ ✦ Lunar Stone: underground caves (any Y)
Found in large circular craters with water,
Lapis, Sea Lanterns, and Magma blocks
Distinctive crater shape — easy to identify
└ ✦ Zephyr Deposit: mountains Y≥130
Spikes and patches on mountain peaks
Exposed on surface — visible from a distance
└ ✦ Solar Crystal: The Nether
Large circular craters with Glowstone and Nether Gold
Same circular pattern as Lunar — but Nether version
◈ CRAFTING CHAIN
└ Lunar Stone → smelt → Lunar Scrap
└ Lunar Scrap + Phantom Membranes → brewing stand
→ celestisynth:starstruck_scrap
└ Feather + Phantom Membranes → brewing stand
→ Starstruck Feather
└ Netherite Ingot + Ghast Tear → smithing table
→ Supernal Netherite Ingot
└ Supernal Netherite Ingot → smelt
→ celestisynth:celestial_netherite_ingot
└ All weapons: crafted at Celestial Crafting Table
(check JEI for full weapon recipe list)
◈ `celestisynth` SCROLL
└ Scroll is in SCROLL_IDS — found in Celestisynth
crater structure loot or equivalent high-tier chest
└ Research time: 25 min
└ Unlocks: full crafting chain, Celestial Crafting Table,
Supernal Netherite upgrade path
▸ Lunar Stone remembers what was underground
before the caves were carved.
Zephyr Deposit is what happens when wind
hardens into mineral.
Solar Crystal is the Nether's version of sunlight.
The chain converts all three into one material.
That is the synthesis.
▶ Collect 4 Lunar Scrap
▶ Begin the Celestisynth crafting chain [check]
◇ Phantom Membranes: farm Phantoms at Y≥130
(above where you need to sleep — or don't sleep).
The Zephyr mountains and Phantom spawns
share the same altitude. Farm both at once.
